items.description: System health check (memory/HEALTH.md): knowledge growth, accuracy, compactness, belief evolution, task throughput
items.note: S437 audit: cadence 5→10. health metrics tracked by economy-health + change-quality-check at cadence=5.

items.description: Tool consolidation: audit tools/ for duplicates, dead code, lost-embedding (P-134). S402: 14 F-tools archived (109→95 active). S440: 0 new orphans; bloat is primary debt (14/106 tools >5000t, 13%). L-1028. L-644 archival rule: archive after DOMEX lane merges. Also track: oversized fraction <10% target.

Scan PRINCIPLES.md for redundant/overlapping principles -- merge or supersede. S395 audit: diminishing returns; cadence 10→15. S426: 4 merged (P-029→P-043, P-077→P-240, P-100→P-188, P-222→P-246; 203→199). S448: 2 merged (P-283→P-276, P-150→P-280; 229→227).

Measure proxy K (python tools/proxy_k.py --save): track bootstrap description length across sessions (F116, PHIL-8). S395 audit: stable <1%, cadence 10→15. S437 audit: stable since S395, cadence 15→25.

Gap audit: test each PHILOSOPHY.md claim against git history, session log, and quantitative evidence. File challenges for any claim where evidence contradicts the stated belief. P-164: confirmation rate >80% = underchallenging signal. S430: 4 challenges filed (PHIL-21/14/18/11). PHIL-21 stale ground truth + Goodhart on level tags; PHIL-14 3/4 goals unmeasured (L-942); PHIL-18 0 challenges in 430s + unfalsifiability risk; PHIL-11 0/48+ signals rejected = total deference. 33 challenge entries total, 1 DROPPED, 4 SUPERSEDED.

Re-swarm docs/PAPER.md: read current beliefs/PHILOSOPHY.md + beliefs/CORE.md + memory/INDEX.md, check paper for drift, fan-out agents to update stale sections, update paper_version header. File challenges for any contradictions found. S395 audit: cosmetic drift only, cadence 10→20.

Swarm setup hygiene: audit SWARM/CORE/bridge/maintenance fundamentals for friction and apply at least one concrete cleanup (or log a blocker with evidence + next action). S431: fixed SWARM.md domain count 43→44, removed orphaned /swarm command reference.
items.note: S437 audit: cadence 5→10. hygiene tasks well-served at 10-session intervals.

items.description: F119 mission constraints: review safety/portability/learning/connectivity invariants and harden enforcement checks against drift.

Auto-sync count drift: run `python3 tools/sync_state.py` to patch INDEX.md / FRONTIER.md / NEXT.md / PRINCIPLES.md headers with live lesson/principle/belief/frontier counts. Addresses ~4% state-sync commit overhead (L-216). Run as part of every handoff.

F121 harvest: read memory/HUMAN-SIGNALS.md, scan for patterns not yet encoded as principles or lessons, extract at least one P- or L- candidate per pass. Update Patterns section. Flag any entry missing artifact refs. Addresses ephemeral human input loss (F121, L-224). S431: L-994 authority paradox (SIG-54), 3 new patterns added, SIG-51-55 flagged as OPEN.

Run python3 tools/change_quality.py: compare recent sessions vs. baseline on knowledge production + overhead. Flag WEAK sessions. A session rated WEAK 2+ consecutive times = root-cause diagnosis needed. (L-223). S432: all 5 sessions ON PAR or ABOVE. Long-term trend IMPROVING (+143%).

Swarm dreaming: free-associative corpus synthesis. Run python3 tools/dream.py — outputs theme gravity map, uncited active principles (anchoring targets), cross-domain resonances, candidate frontier questions. Act on at least one output per run: write a lesson citing an uncited principle, or add a candidate frontier to tasks/FRONTIER.md. (F125). S418: L-925 written (P-262/P-238/P-017 anchored), F-ISO2 added, F-META8 updated. 65 resonances, 31.1% uncited rate.
items.note: S437 audit: cadence 15→25. creative synthesis lower priority than operational maintenance.

items.description: Periodic-system audit: evaluate periodics coverage/ROI, add or prune items, and update cadence based on observed utility and maintenance overhead. Confirm orient/check surfacing stays aligned. S395: pruned 3 dormant (cross-variant-harvest, modes-reswarm, action-board-refresh), adjusted 5 cadences (dream 7→15, proxy-k 10→15, paper 10→20, principles-dedup 10→15, iso-sprint 30→50). 22→19 items. S437: pruned iso-annotation-sprint (dark matter stable 75s), merged historian-repair into historian-routing. Adjusted 6 cadences: health 5→10, economy 5→10, setup 5→10, dream 15→25, proxy-k 15→25, science-quality 10→20. Load 3.86→2.8 runs/session. 27→25 items.
items.note: S437: cadence 20→15. This meta-periodic went 42 sessions between audits - should not recur.

items.description: Swarm economy health check: run `python3 tools/economy_expert.py` — report on production velocity, proxy-K drift, Sharpe ratio, lane throughput, and helper ROI. Act on any WARN/URGENT/TRIGGER output (L-286, domains/economy/).
items.note: S437 audit: cadence 5→10. production velocity tracked by change-quality-check at cadence=5.

items.description: Process QUEUED challenges in beliefs/CHALLENGES.md: execute oldest QUEUED item, produce evidence, update status. L-523: governance builds queues it doesn't process. Auto-escalate any item QUEUED >50 sessions. (F-GOV3, ISO-13)

Archive old MERGED/ABANDONED SWARM-LANES rows: run `python3 tools/lanes_compact.py --age 5` — moves rows from sessions older than 5 from SWARM-LANES.md to SWARM-LANES-ARCHIVE.md. Target: ≤1.3x bloat ratio (rows/unique-lanes). At 2.09x, run immediately. (L-317, L-304, tools/lanes_compact.py).

Principle extraction batch: scan ~50 recent lessons for principle-worthy candidates not yet in PRINCIPLES.md. Extract top 5-10 as P-NNN. L-662: rate collapsed 63%→4%; batch extraction is the structural remedy. Target: maintain ≥10% promotion rate.

Expectation calibration audit: run `python3 tools/expect_harvest.py --report` — check directional accuracy, bias types, and per-domain calibration. Act on systematic biases (sprint artifact anchoring, mechanism misidentification, underconfidence). Target: direction accuracy >75%, underconfidence ratio <5:1. (L-778, F-META12)

Science quality audit: run `python3 tools/science_quality.py` — score experiment quality on 5 criteria (pre-registration, control, significance, external validation, falsification). Track confirm/discover ratio and falsification lane count. Target: mean quality >40%, falsification lanes >10%, confirm:discover <10:1. (P-243, L-804, SIG-36)
items.note: S437 audit: cadence 10→20. quality metrics covered by enforcement-audit + bayesian-calibration.

items.description: Signal backlog audit: run `python3 tools/swarm_signal.py read --status OPEN` and review each OPEN signal. Mark RESOLVED via `python3 tools/swarm_signal.py resolve <SIG-ID> "<evidence>"`: (a) observation-type signals where described work is committed; (b) directive-type signals with implementing L/P/F/tool artifact. Root cause of backlog: resolution-tracking failure — implementations exist but statuses never updated (L-811). Target: OPEN count <10, median signal age <20 sessions. (L-811, L-814, SIG-2, F-META2)

Bayesian calibration audit: run `python3 tools/bayes_meta.py --json > experiments/meta/bayes-meta-s<N>.json` — compute Bayesian posteriors for all frontiers, ECE, publication bias, replication inconsistencies. Target: ECE <0.15 (current 0.159 at S432). 27 overconfident frontiers (<3 exps). Publication bias NEUTRAL. (L-903, tools/bayes_meta.py)

Prescription enforcement audit: run `python3 tools/enforcement_router.py --min-sharpe 8 --top 20` — check enforcement rate of rule-bearing lessons (STRUCTURAL/PERIODIC/ASPIRATIONAL). Add #L-NNN citations to existing tool implementations. Wire new Sharpe>=9 aspirational prescriptions as maintenance checks or periodics. Target: enforcement rate >15% (was 10.5% at S400, 19.3% at S422, 10.0% at S444 — dilution active). See L-843, L-846, L-1062, F-META2. Every ASPIRATIONAL lesson with Sharpe>=9 is a prescription that decays per L-601. L-1062: cadence 10→5→3 (enforcement dilution, L-1066 N≥1000 waypoint at S448).
History integrity audit: run python3 tools/history_integrity.py to measure outcome completeness (target 80%), lesson attribution, commit format. L-984: 38% baseline S429. Target: 80% by S448.

Historian routing + repair scan: (1) run python3 tools/historian_router.py — identify MERGED domain lanes with global frontier synthesis candidates; (2) run frontier_crosslink.py --apply --threshold 6 to maintain crosslinks (L-1022: link decay); (3) run historian_repair.py — detect stale beliefs (>50s), anxiety-zone frontiers (>15s), domain DOMEX gaps (>30s), apply --repair to close stale lanes. Route synthesis-ready work to dispatch. F-NK6 M3 mechanism (L-996, L-800). S436: domain→global linkage 28.3%. Target: maintain ≥20% linkage. L-1060: cadence 5→3 (M3 routing generates ~2 updates/session; tighter cadence maintains global coverage).
items.note: S437 audit: absorbed historian-repair scope (was separate cadence=10 item). Combined here at cadence=5.
items.last_note: S446: historian_router.py + frontier_crosslink.py --apply --threshold 6. 3 crosslinks applied (F-EVAL2→F-META15, F-EXP12→F-META8, F-EXP12→F-META15). Linkage 37.1% (was 28.3%). Burst pattern confirmed: cadence=3 delivers global updates.

items.description: Cross-layer cascade monitor: run python3 tools/cascade_monitor.py to detect correlated filter-layer failures. Alert if >=2 adjacent layers failing simultaneously. T.stale_baselines is highest-yield check (catches C1/C4 type cascades). CONFIRMED: 4/5 retroactive detections within <=3s (F-FLT4, L-1018). Wired S436.

Scaling timelines update: refresh docs/SCALING-TIMELINES.md — update Current Position table (N, P, S, K_avg, Zipf α, ECE), retire falsified/confirmed projections, move crossed thresholds to Already Crossed, revise scenario trajectories if actual diverges from base case. Run: python3 tools/scaling_model.py --report + python3 tools/compact.py --dry-run for live metrics. Created S441.

FMEA periodic coverage audit: run `python3 tools/check_fmea_audit.py --verbose` — cross-check periodics.json against FMEA defense layers. Detects undercounted periodic-backed layers (FM-30 case: cascade-monitor periodic S436 missed by S441 manual auditor). Report upgrade candidates. L-601: manual auditors miss pre-existing periodic registrations. (Built S445, L-1063 meta-target).
